name: Cryogenic and Asphyxiant Gas Inventory Reporting
description: Add Liquid Nitrogen and Compressed Argon to the facility's chemical inventory in EPA Tier2 Submit. The application should be open with the 'Advanced Physical Sciences Center' facility loaded. Add Nitrogen (CAS: 7727-37-9) as a Pure Liquid (EHS: No) with 'Gas under pressure' and 'Simple Asphyxiant' hazards. Amounts: Max 15,000 lbs, Avg 8,000 lbs, 365 days. Storage: Cryogenic tank, Greater than ambient pressure, Cryogenic conditions, located at 'East Loading Dock Bulk Tank'. Add Argon (CAS: 7440-37-1) as a Pure Gas (EHS: No) with 'Gas under pressure' and 'Simple Asphyxiant' hazards. Amounts: Max 12,000 lbs, Avg 10,000 lbs, 365 days. Storage: Cylinder, Greater than ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, located at 'Room 104 Gas Manifold'. Once both are added, save the submission strictly to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\university_gases.t2s.
